name: Affogato Cookie
description:
"Here.. have a taste..."

Affogato Cookie had lit an incense and made himself a bowl of rich ice cream, with the idea to settle down for the night in the chilly castle grounds. However, he caught sight of someone who was drawn in by his incense. With an internal smirk, he decides to entertain himself. With the ice cream included, of course.

affogyatto!!! sorry. demons. ANYWAYS hi anon number 1 this is for you!! hope you enjoy! caught your request pretty quick i think heh. been really enjoying making cookie run bots tbh, love all of them, siiiigh... as per usual, it's anyPOV and avoids using "you" in place of your character's name. for those unaware, i have a strawpage for anonymous requests on my profile if you don't want to request publicly on a bot of mine!! ALSO if this is not to your standards and sucks to you, please leave a review saying why and i will tinker more!
